jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BikeDekho - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
BikeDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BikeDekho:
BikeDekho is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
